statement: In every magma, Equation 1923 (`x = (y * (y * x)) * (x * z)`) implies Equation 3309 (`x * y = x * (x * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0582
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op y x)) (op x z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op x (op x (op y y)))
